strategic_objective: Quantify the stability and origin of class-conditioned structural variations to distinguish true behavioral differences from sampling or measurement biases.
key_checks: Compare variance ratios and unique value counts across multiple time windows
Test for consistency of class-conditioned distribution differences under varying network conditions
Evaluate potential sampling biases by cross-referencing with capture metadata
Assess whether structural variations align with known DDoS behavioral signatures
success_criteria: Robust confirmation that structural variations reflect genuine class-distinguishing behavior
Detection or exclusion of sampling or measurement bias as primary variation source
Demonstrated stability of these variations across temporal and network condition subsets
